title: Polish Truffle Goulash
description: A hearty and flavorful goulash made with polish sausage and truffle flavors. Perfect for a cold winter night.

ingredients.name: Polish Sausage
ingredients.notes: you can use any type of polish sausage you like

ingredients.name: Gooey Cheese
ingredients.notes: such as mozzarella or string cheese

ingredients.name: Herbal Soup Broth
ingredients.notes: you can use store-bought or homemade broth

ingredients.name: Truffle Oil
ingredients.notes: use sparingly for a rich truffle flavor

instructions: Heat the soup broth in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the polish sausage and cook until browned.
Add the gooey cheese and stir until melted.
Add the truffle oil and stir to combine.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh parsley.
